{{Infobox group
| name = Eternity
| introduced = cradle-13-threshold
}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Eternity]] specializes in creating and augmenting monsters.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c11">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Eternity]] is an organization with a headquarters.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Eternity Incorporated]] is an organization [[Ziel]] intends to destroy.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c11" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle groups]]
